data.raceComments: {"comment":"5. BEEP has mixed form recently, finishing fourth (22.22) in a Restricted WIN at this track latest but did run well two back when in the frame. Key player on best and worth another chance. 1. SIMULATION has been settling off the speed lately, finishing fifth (22.57) last time in a Restricted WIN at this track. Solid record at the distance winning two races. Leading chance. 2. ASTON ELIJAH stalked the lead and fought on well to finish 8 lengths away in third (22.32) at this track in a Grade 5 over 380m. Comes through a solid form race last start. Will give a great sight again. 3. HARMS BEST can finish much closer after missing a cheque at this track last start.","runners":[5,1,2,3],"exclusive":false}
